description_long: This object depicts a young male motorcycle rider dressed in a striking, urban-style outfit. He wears a colorful, detailed jacket with red, yellow, and black accents, featuring a large wolf emblem and the words 'Lone Wolf' and 'Incinerator' on the back. The jacket is paired with black pants that have reinforced knee pads and matching boots, suggesting protective gear suitable for riding. His hair is short and dark, and he does not appear to be wearing a helmet. The sleeves of the jacket display additional patches and insignias, adding to the urban, biker aesthetic. The overall appearance is that of a stylish, safety-conscious rider ready for city streets.
description: A young male motorcycle rider in a colorful, detailed jacket with protective pants and boots, exuding an urban biker style. The jacket features a large wolf emblem and bold text on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rider's facial features, detailed jacket design, and protective pants and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm patches, and the layered structure of the pants and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large wolf emblem, 'Lone Wolf' and 'Incinerator' text on the jacket, and the back details of the pants and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, additional jacket patches, and the segmented design of the leg protection.
